title: Biometric Reading
description: Schema for a processed biometric reading from an athlete's wearable sensors in the AthleteView AI platform.

athlete_id.description: UUID of the athlete this reading belongs to.

device_id.description: Identifier of the wearable device that produced this reading.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the reading was captured.

session_id.description: UUID of the training or match session this reading belongs to.

heart_rate_bpm.description: Heart rate in beats per minute.

spo2_pct.description: Blood oxygen saturation as a percentage.

sdnn_ms.description: Standard deviation of NN intervals in milliseconds.

rmssd_ms.description: Root mean square of successive differences in milliseconds.

pnn50_pct.description: Percentage of successive NN intervals differing by more than 50ms.

lf_power.description: Low-frequency power component (0.04-0.15 Hz) in ms^2.

hf_power.description: High-frequency power component (0.15-0.4 Hz) in ms^2.

lf_hf_ratio.description: Ratio of low-frequency to high-frequency power.

core_temperature_c.description: Estimated core body temperature in degrees Celsius.

skin_temperature_c.description: Measured skin temperature in degrees Celsius.

respiration_rate.description: Respiration rate in breaths per minute.

environment.description: Ambient environmental conditions at the time of reading.

heat_index.description: Computed heat index (apparent temperature) in degrees Celsius.

wbgt.description: Wet-bulb globe temperature in degrees Celsius (outdoor heat stress index).

motion.description: Motion and activity metrics derived from IMU data.

steps.description: Cumulative step count for the session.

speed_mps.description: Instantaneous speed in metres per second.

sweat.description: Sweat biochemistry analysis from on-body sensors.

sodium_mmol.description: Sodium concentration in millimoles per litre.

chloride_mmol.description: Chloride concentration in millimoles per litre.

glucose_mmol.description: Glucose concentration in millimoles per litre.

lactate_mmol.description: Lactate concentration in millimoles per litre.

sweat_rate_ml_hr.description: Sweat rate in millilitres per hour.

injury_risk_score.description: AI-computed injury risk score (0 = low risk, 100 = high risk).

performance_index.description: AI-computed overall performance index (0 = poor, 100 = peak).

intensity_zone.description: Current exercise intensity zone based on heart rate zones.

signal_quality.description: Overall signal quality of the sensor readings (0.0 = unusable, 1.0 = perfect).

alerts.description: Active biometric alerts triggered by this reading.

metric_name.description: Name of the metric that triggered the alert.

current_value.description: The value that triggered the alert.
